## Description

What does this pull request change?

## Change type

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] New API action
- [ ] New example code
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Security note

## Checklist

- [ ] I did not include a real API key, panel URL, access code, username, password, or customer data.
- [ ] I used placeholders where needed.
- [ ] I added test output or usage notes when relevant.
- [ ] I updated the documentation when needed.
